mapper.select: SELECT slip_no FROM slip WHERE slip_no LIKE CONCAT(#{ym}, '%') ORDER BY slip_no DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO slip ( slip_no, staff_name, customer_name, contact_info, email_address, loan_date, return_date ) VALUES ( #{slipNo}, #{staffName}, #{customerName}, #{contactInfo}, #{emailAddress}, #{loanDate}, #{returnDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, slip_no AS slipNo, staff_name AS staffName, customer_name AS customerName, contact_info AS contactInfo, email_address AS emailAddress, loan_date AS loanDate, return_date AS returnDate, created_at AS createdAt FROM slip WHERE slip_no = #{slipNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE slip SET staff_name = #{staffName}, customer_name = #{customerName}, contact_info = #{contactInfo}, email_address = #{emailAddress}, loan_date = #{loanDate}, return_date = #{returnDate} WHERE id = #{id}
